meaning: adj.手边的,就近的,唾手可得的,便利的,敏捷的,容易取得的
examples: Don't throw that away—it might come in handy.
It would be good to have a pencil and paper handy.
There is a handy storage compartment beneath the oven.
Revolvers also come in handy with other short-term expenses, such as payroll and utilities.
The detachable cord is handy, but there's no locking mechanism to keep it in place.
